case_title: RICK MILLER VS. ARUSYAK KIRPICHYAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,438.00 FILED BY MILLER, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT KIRPICHYAN, ARUSYAK DIRECTOR ABSOLUTELY NEW, INC. LOYOLA, KAILA COORDINATOR/ASSISTANT ABSOLUTELY NEW, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT FROM DEFENDANT ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC. FILED. IT WAS FORWARDED TO THE COMMISSIONER AND GIVEN BACK TO SMALL CLAIMS.
DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES PER ORDER OF AUGUST 25, 2010. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-26-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (1) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD ABSOLUTELY NEW, INC. AS A DEFENDANT. (2) PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE THE REMAINING DEFENDANT'S; ABSOLUTELY NEW, INC. AGREESTO ACCEPT SERVICE BY FEDEX, CERTIFIED MAIL OR SIMILAR TRACKABLE DELIVERY. (3) DEFENDANT MAY FILE A DEMAND FOR ARBITRATION ON OR BEFORE APRIL 30, 2010; PLAINTIFF MAY OBJECT OR REPLY ON OR BEFORE MAY 14, 2010. (4) PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) (PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ARE TO REMAIN IN THE COURT FILE)
REQUEST FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, RICK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT.TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PRESNT IN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED MAR-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIRPICHYAN, ARUSYAK DIRECTOR ABSOLUTELY NEW, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-25-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. MATTER IS REFERRED FOR ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO DEFENDANT'S DEMAND. IF CASE HAS NOT BEEN DISMISSED, THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR TO INFORM THE COURT OF THE STATUS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE TO REMAIN IN THE COURT FILE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-22-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THE MATTER SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ABSOLUTELY NEW ONLY. COMMISSIONER : PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) *****PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS TO REMAIN IN COURT FILE*****
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KIRPICHYAN, ARUSYAK DIRECTOR ABSOLUTELY NEW, INC.
LETTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, RICK
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DEFENDANT'S DEMAND FOR ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES SHALL COOPERATE IN INSTITUTING ARBITRATION AS PROVIDED IN THE SUBJECT AGREEMENT. THE CASE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR PENDING THE OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
